---
title: "Nachrichten"
subtitle: "Aktuelles aus den Arbeitsgruppen"
toc: false
comments: false
listing:
    contents: 
    - "./news/*de.qmd"
    - "!./news/*.qmd"
    image-align: left
    fields: [image, title, date, categories, description]
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    grid-item-align: center
    sort: "date desc"
    feed: true
---
